spec_match.rationale: Directly proves the script-aware letter-spacing no-op intervention using a side-by-side matrix of 10 distinct cursive vs non-cursive script runs.

interactive.rationale: Features a range slider from 0 to 8px that updates all sample scripts' CSS letter-spacing properties on input.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Accurately describes cursive script joining rules and why pre-138 behaviors caused layout breakage.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers mixed numbers, digits, Urdu, Arabic, Hebrew, Thai, Greek, Cyrillic, Latin, and CJK script variations.

references.rationale: The `see also` section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/4885407109742592 directly.

design_system.rationale: Beautifully structured coverage matrix matching standard card boundaries and contrasting backgrounds.

summary: A very neat and clean coverage matrix showing 10 distinct script types, but it contains a broken or mismatched ChromeStatus reference link that needs to be corrected.
